data.headline: Cash position maintained; SPY outperformed by 122 basis points
data.summary: No trades executed today. Portfolio remains fully invested in cash at $1,000,000 with zero portfolio return, underperforming the SPY benchmark which returned 1.23% for an alpha of -1.23%. No open holdings. Process executed 9 decisions with 7 refusals and 1 risk engine approval.
data.risk_note: Portfolio completely out of market; benchmark underperformance is structural given zero equity exposure while SPY rallied 122 bps.
